summary: I am Muhammad Nabil Muyassar Rahman, a full-stack software developer based in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. I build enterprise platforms for logistics, freight forwarding, PPIC, inventory, sales, and digital publishing workflows.

My recent work focuses on TypeScript-first systems with Bun, Express, tRPC, Prisma, Better Auth, Angular, and PrimeNG. I take ownership from schema design and stack decisions through frontend implementation, deployment, and production maintenance.

I care about software that reduces operational friction: unified codebases, multi-tenant SSO, audit-ready data flows, Excel-like batch editing, reliable file pipelines, and CI/CD that keeps source code and deployments controlled.
